scripts.dev: lsof -ti:3000,5000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
